verification.source_observation: GitHub accepted the package update and workflow creation and returned immutable commit SHAs.
verification.reason: No completed workflow run associated with the new workflow commit was available during the run.

privacy_boundary: Only public repository source, commit metadata, and synthetic validation behavior are represented. No private chat, health, credentials, contact data, or unreviewed uploads are included.
limits: A committed workflow is not evidence that GitHub Actions executed successfully.
The check does not block merges unless repository branch protection requires it.
The validator checks graph structure and provenance fields, not whether each claim is substantively true.
Source locators are structurally checked but are not yet fetched and cryptographically verified by the continuity validator.
falsification_route: Dispatch or trigger the continuity workflow, inspect its job and step results, then introduce an invalid continuity fixture on a test branch. The gate is falsified if the invalid record passes or if npm run verify:continuity omits either the test suite or aggregate validator.
